## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Video

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording.

## Environment

- Device: [e.g. Pixel 7, Samsung S24]
- OS: [e.g. Android 14]
- App Version: [e.g. v1.2.0]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
